Use.title: The four primitives you'll use all day.
Use.lede: Most of @slideglance/builder is composed from four ideas. Memorize these and the rest of the day is just practice.

Use.title: Containers stack content.
Use.body: VStack stacks children vertically; HStack arranges them in a row. Both honour Flex-style gap, padding, alignItems.

Use.title: Styles centralize visual choices.
Use.body: Every color, font, and rule lives in a Style. Body content references them by class= name, never by literal hex.

Use.title: Templates are macros.
Use.body: Templates wrap a stack of nodes in a reusable shape. A <Use> substitutes attributes into placeholders like {title}.

Use.title: Masters are page chrome.
Use.body: Each slide picks a Master; the master paints the running header, footer, and slide number behind the slide content.

VStack.Text: Your toolkit by the end of the day.

Use.label: HEADS-UP
Use.body: We'll build one shared deck across the whole workshop. Each part adds one primitive — by Part 5 the deck has its own master, template family, and chapter files.

Use.label: HOUSEKEEPING
Use.body: Code blocks fit on three lines. If yours wraps, your style ramp is too small — increase the font and re-flow the content.
